name.en-US: Homily on the Passage "If your enemy hunger, feed him."

sources.description: Translated by W.R.W. Stephens. From Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers, First Series, Vol. 9, Edited by Philip Schaff, Buffalo, NY: Christian Literature Publishing Co 1889. Revised and edited for New Advent by Kevin Knight.

title.en-US: Homily on the Passage "If your enemy hunger, feed him."
